welcome. i am melvin blackhammar

Hello there!

Happy to have you here! I'm a 3rd year student at the Royal Institute of Technology (KTH), in Sweden.

Currently, I'm doing my Bachelor as a part of becoming a Civilingenjör in Electrical Engineering. My thesis project investigates first order optimization methods, i.e. SGD and the variants Momentum, Nesterov and Adam.

To see my projects in detail, go to Portfolio in the menu above, or have a look at decollinoire@github ('decollinoire' ≈ 'Blackhammar').
